perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman in a grey t-shirt and striped shorts holding a tablet and smiling at the camera in an indoor room. (2) She begins to react animatedly to comments on the tablet, pointing at dark stains on the chest of her shirt and gesturing with high energy and exaggerated facial expressions of frustration and surprise. (3) She opens a yellow tub of skincare product and uses a white brush to apply a translucent gel to her face, showing a visible shift from agitation to relaxation. (4) She continues to alternate between applying the mask and interacting with comments shown on a smartphone screen, eventually asking the viewers to vote on her clothing choice.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched female vocals speak rapidly in Mandarin with a noticeable Korean accent, accompanied by upbeat, medium-tempo background music. (2) As the subject becomes more animated, vocal volume increases with occasional shouting and sharp sound effects like hand-claps and dramatic stings. (3) The music remains consistent but transitions to a more tranquil or neutral feel while the product is applied, with audible sounds of the jar opening and brush strokes. (4) The video ends with a mix of conversational speech and the recurring upbeat BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 被留言氣到崩潰的韓國人' (POV: A Korean person collapsing from being angry at comments) - Hook text. (2) '汗不汗？' (Sweaty or not?) - Emphasis text. (3) '(幸福)' (Happiness), '(已成為多汗的女子)' (Has become a sweaty woman), '(真不理解😂)' (Really don't understand) - Decorative/Emotional variety-show style captions. (4) '剛起床就用冰肌凍膜' (Using ice skin mask right after waking up) - Functional product description. (5) '韓國保養品的話我都在Line群組分享喔！！' (I share Korean skincare in my Line group!!) - Call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Angry Reaction) -> Context (Reading Comments) -> Solution (Product Application) -> Outro (CTA)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing throughout the video
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with medium-length brown hair, wearing a grey crew-neck t-shirt and grey/white striped lounge shorts. She has fair skin and expressive facial features.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting with a white storage cabinet/wardrobe, some skincare products on a desk, and a clothes hanger with a black garment in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a comedic 'angry reaction' to viewer comments about sweat stains as a hook to promote a cooling skincare product (ice mask). It aims to blend relatable lifestyle content with product endorsement to drive viewers to a private Line community group.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Directly mentions the product is from Korea, shows its application, and includes a call to action for a private shopping group.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Korean-accented Mandarin with dramatic variety-show style editing and text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The creator uses high-energy personality and self-deprecating humor (regarding the 'sweat' stains) to build authenticity before pivoting to a commercial recommendation.
